case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARCO ANTONIO REYNOSO HOYOS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED SEP-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOYOS, MARCO ANTONIO REYNOSO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOYOS, MARCO ANTONIO REYNOSO $1,484.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,564.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HOYOS, MARCO ANTONIO REYNOSO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,484.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HOYOS, MARCO ANTONIO REYNOSO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARCO ANTONIO REYNOS HOYOS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/22/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/17/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
